title: The Strategy of Asymmetry
author: From: Nassim Taleb
content: Seek situations where the potential upside is significantly larger than the potential downside. This is the definition of a 'good bet'.

title: The Principle of Skin in the Game
author: From: Nassim Taleb
content: If you don't have something at risk, you are not really learning. Wisdom comes from the consequences of being wrong.
action: Commit to a deadline to gain skin in the game.

title: The Lindy Effect
author: From: Benoit Mandelbrot
content: For things that do not perish (ideas, technologies), the future life expectancy is proportional to its current age. Old, proven ideas are often better than new, unproven ones.
action: Use a proven method instead of a trend.

title: The Error-Correction Cadence
author: From: Strategic Management
content: Innovation is not about being right the first time; it is about the frequency of your error-correction cycles.

title: The Principle of Maximum Leverage
author: From: Archimedes
content: Give me a lever long enough and a fulcrum on which to place it, and I shall move the world. Find your fulcrum.
action: Focus exclusively on the one high-leverage task.
